evaluations.prompt: Review this diff for conventions compliance.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent reviews ONLY for style and documentation violations (headers, naming, docstrings, thresholds). It does NOT refactor business logic, fix bugs, or make architectural suggestions. Scope is strictly formatting and documentation.

evaluations.prompt: Check this Python function for conventions compliance.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent flags any Python function signature missing type annotations. Every parameter and return value must have type hints. Agent reports each missing annotation as a separate violation.

evaluations.prompt: A new script was just added to plugins/. Review for conventions.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent verifies the script has a file header AND is registered in tool_inventory.json. If either is missing, both are flagged as separate violations. Agent does NOT proceed without confirming registration.
